# Skill: CONTRIBUTING Maintainer

## Purpose
Create or update CONTRIBUTING.md (English) for the Café Debug API.

## File target
- CONTRIBUTING.md (English, root)

## Required sections in order
1. Language switcher: `🇺🇸 English | 🇧🇷 [Português](docs/README.pt-BR.md)`
2. About the project
3. How to contribute (issues, branch naming: feature/ and fix/)
4. Development standards (mirrors the pt-BR version rules)
5. Submitting your PR (checklist format)
6. Running the project locally
7. Respect and community guidelines

## Branch naming convention to preserve
- feature/feature-name
- fix/bug-name

## Rules
- Code standards section must match the pt-BR version exactly (just in English)
- Never remove the link to debug-automation setup project
- After updating, remind the user to run translate-ptbr-skill
